The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it a promising candidate for the treatment of various diseases, including infections and inflammation. Herbal preparations made from Antirhea microphylla include decoctions and infusions, which are traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
